message:
test(core,search): add 66 tests for metrics, toon, and flake_triage modules

- metrics.rs (+24): percentile edge cases, push_window behavior, latency
  accessors, index metrics from_counts, alert state checks, serde roundtrips
- toon.rs (+22): normalize_mime direct tests, parse_token_line/parse_saved_line
  edge cases, case-insensitive format resolution, derive trait coverage
- flake_triage.rs (+20): FailureCategory/FlakeVerdict serde all variants,
  classify_failure additional keywords, extend_seeds edge cases, RunOutcome
  serde, multiline histogram, clone/debug coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
